info.title: Companies House Public Data API
info.description: An API suite providing read only access to search and retrieve public company data

get.description: Search companies, officers and disqualified officers

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The term being searched for.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of search results to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The index of the first result item to return.

get.description: Search company information

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The term being searched for.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of search results to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The index of the first result item to return.

parameters.name: restrictions
parameters.description: Enumerable options to restrict search results. Space separate multiple restriction options to combine functionality. For a "company name availability" search use "active-companies legally-equivalent-company-name" together.

get.description: Search for officer information

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The term being searched for.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of search results to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The index of the first result item to return.

get.description: Search for disqualified officer information

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The term being searched for.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of search results to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The index of the first result item to return.

get.description: Search for a dissolved company

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The company name being searched for

parameters.name: search_type
parameters.description: Determines type of search. Options are alphabetical, best-match, previous-name-dissolved

parameters.name: search_above
parameters.description: The ordered_alpha_key_with_id used for alphabetical paging

parameters.name: search_below
parameters.description: The ordered_alpha_key_with_id used for alphabetical paging

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The maximum number of results matching the search term(s) to return with a range of 1 to 100

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: Used in best-match and previous-name-dissolved search-type

422.description: Invalid size parameter, size must be greater than zero and not greater than 100

get.description: Search for a company

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The company name being searched for

parameters.name: search_above
parameters.description: The ordered_alpha_key_with_id used for paging

parameters.name: search_below
parameters.description: The ordered_alpha_key_with_id used for paging

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The maximum number of results matching the search term(s) to return with a range of 1 to 100

422.description: Invalid size parameter, size must be greater than zero and not greater than 100

get.description: Advanced search for a company

parameters.name: company_name_includes
parameters.description: The company name includes advanced search filter

parameters.name: company_name_excludes
parameters.description: The company name excludes advanced search filter

parameters.name: company_status
parameters.description: The company status advanced search filter. To search using multiple values, use a comma delimited list or multiple of the same key i.e. company_status=xxx&company_status=yyy

parameters.name: company_subtype
parameters.description: The company subtype advanced search filter. To search using multiple values, use a comma delimited list or multiple of the same key i.e. company_subtype=xxx&company_subtype=yyy

parameters.name: company_type
parameters.description: The company type advanced search filter. To search using multiple values, use a comma delimited list or multiple of the same key i.e. company_type=xxx&company_type=yyy

parameters.name: dissolved_from
parameters.description: The dissolved from date advanced search filter

parameters.name: dissolved_to
parameters.description: The dissolved to date advanced search filter

parameters.name: incorporated_from
parameters.description: The incorporated from date advanced search filter

parameters.name: incorporated_to
parameters.description: The incorporated to date advanced search filter

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The location advanced search filter

parameters.name: sic_codes
parameters.description: The SIC codes advanced search filter. To search using multiple values, use a comma delimited list or multiple of the same key i.e. sic_codes=xxx&sic_codes=yyy

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The maximum number of results matching the search term(s) to return with a range of 1 to 5000

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The point at which results will start from i.e show search results from result 20 (used for paging)

get.description: List of all company officers

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the officer list being requested.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of officers to return per page.

parameters.name: register_type
parameters.description: The register_type determines which officer type is returned for the registers view.The register_type field will only work if registers_view is set to true

parameters.name: register_view
parameters.description: Display register specific information. If given register is held at Companies House, registers_view set to true and correct register_type specified, only active officers will be returned. Defaults to false

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The offset into the entire result set that this page starts.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: The field by which to order the result set.

get.description: Get details of an individual company officer appointment

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the officer list being requested.

parameters.name: appointment_id
parameters.description: The appointment id of the company officer appointment being requested.

get.description: Get the company registers information

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the register information to return.

get.description: Get the filing history item of a company

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number that the single filing is required for.

parameters.name: transaction_id
parameters.description: The transaction id that the filing history is required for.

404.description: Filing history not available for this company

get.description: Get the filing history list of a company

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: One or more comma-separated categories to filter by (inclusive).

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number that the filing history is required for.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of filing history items to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The index into the entire result set that this result page starts.

404.description: Filing history not available for this company

get.description: Company exemptions information

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number that the exemptions list is required for.

get.description: Get a natural officer's disqualifications

parameters.name: officer_id
parameters.description: The disqualified officer's id.

get.description: Get a corporate officer's disqualifications

parameters.description: The disqualified officer id.
parameters.name: officer_id

get.description: List of all officer appointments

parameters.name: officer_id
parameters.description: The officer id of the appointment list being requested.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Use “active” to return only active appointments.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of appointments to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The first row of data to retrieve, starting at 0. Use this parameter as a pagination mechanism along with the items_per_page parameter.

get.description: List of charges for a company.

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number that the charge list is required for.

parameters.title: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of charges to return per page.
parameters.name: itemsPerPage

parameters.title: start_index
parameters.description: The index into the entire result set that this result page starts.
parameters.name: startIndex

get.description: Individual charge information for company.

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number that the charge is required for.

parameters.name: charge_id
parameters.description: The id of the charge details that are required.

get.description: Company insolvency information

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the basic information to return.

get.description: List of uk-establishments companies

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: Company number

get.summary: List the company persons with significant control
get.description: List of all persons with significant control (not statements)

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the persons with significant control list being requested.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of persons with significant control to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The offset into the entire result set that this page starts.

parameters.name: register_view
parameters.description:
Display register specific information. If register is held at Companies House and register_view is set to true, only PSCs which are active or were terminated during election period are shown. Accepted values are: -`true`  
 -`false`  
 Defaults to false.

get.summary: Get the individual person with significant control notification
get.description: Get details of the individual person with significant control notification

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the person with significant control details being requested.

parameters.name: notification_id
parameters.description: The notification id of the person with significant control notification being requested.

parameters.name: company_number

get.summary: List the company persons with significant control statements
get.description: List of all persons with significant control statements

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the persons with significant control statements list being requested.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The id of the legal person with significant control details being requested.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The offset into the entire result set that this page starts.

parameters.name: register_view
parameters.description:
Display register specific information. If register is held at Companies House and register_view is set to true, only statements which are active or were withdrawn during election period are shown. Accepted values are: -`true`  
 -`false`  
 Defaults to false.

get.summary: Get the person with significant control statement
get.description: Get details of a person with significant control statement

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the persons with significant control statements list being requested.

parameters.name: statement_id
parameters.description: The id of the person with significant control statement details being requested.

get.summary: Get the super secure person with significant control
get.description: Get details of a super secure person with significant control

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the super secure person with significant control details being requested.

parameters.name: super_secure_id
parameters.description: The id of the super secure person with significant control details being requested.

get.summary: Get the super secure beneficial owner
get.description: Get details of a super secure beneficial owner

parameters.name: company_number

parameters.name: super_secure_id
parameters.description: The id of the super secure beneficial owner details being requested.

get.summary: Persons with significant control Notification List
get.description: List of all notifications of a specific person with significant control

parameters.name: psc_id
parameters.description: The person with significant control id of the notification list being requested

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Use “active” to return only active notifications.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: The number of notifications to return per page.

parameters.name: start_index
parameters.description: The first row of data to retrieve, starting at 0. Use this parameter as a pagination mechanism along with the items_per_page parameter.

200.description: List the person with significant control notifications

get.description: Get the current address of a company

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: Company number for registered office address

get.description: Get the basic company information

parameters.name: company_number
parameters.description: The company number of the basic information to return.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

accept_appropriate_office_address_statem.description: Setting this to true confirms  that the new registered office address is an appropriate address as outlined in section 86(2) of the Companies Act 2006.

period_end_on.description: The last day of the most recently filed accounting period.

period_start_on.description: The first day of the most recently filed accounting period.

type.description:
The type of the last company accounts filed.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `account_type` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml).

due_on.description: The date the next company accounts are due

overdue.description: Flag indicating if the company accounts are overdue.

period_end_on.description: The last day of the next accounting period to be filed.

period_start_on.description: The first day of the next accounting period to be filed.

last_made_up_to.description: The date the last annual return was made up to.

next_due.description: The date the next annual return is due. This member will only be returned if a confirmation statement has not been filed and the date is before 28th July 2016, otherwise refer to `confirmation_statement.next_due`

next_made_up_to.description: The date the next annual return should be made up to. This member will only be returned if a confirmation statement has not been filed and the date is before 30th July 2016, otherwise refer to `confirmation_statement.next_made_up_to`

overdue.description: Flag indicating if the annual return is overdue.

last_made_up_to.description: The date to which the company last made a confirmation statement.

next_due.description: The date by which the next confimation statement must be received.

next_made_up_to.description: The date to which the company must next make a confirmation statement.

overdue.description: Flag indicating if the confirmation statement is overdue

country.description: Country in which company was incorporated.

name.description: Identity of register in country of incorporation.

day.description: Day on which accounting period starts under parent law.

month.description: Month in which accounting period starts under parent law.

day.description: Day on which accounting period ends under parent law.

month.description: Month in which accounting period ends under parent law.

months.description: Number of months within which to file.

foreign_account_type.description:
Type of accounting requirement that applies.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `foreign_account_type` section in the [enumeration mappings] (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml).

terms_of_account_publication.description:
Describes how the publication date is derived.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `terms_of_account_publication` section in the [enumeration mappings] (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml).

registration_number.description: Registration number in company of incorporation.

governed_by.description: Law governing the company in country of incorporation.

company_type.description: Legal form of the company in the country of incorporation.

is_a_credit_finance_institution.description: Is it a financial or credit institution.

business_activity.description: Type of business undertaken by the company.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

effective_from.description: The date from which the company name was effective.

ceased_on.description: The date on which the company name ceased.

created_on.description: The date on which the corporate annotation was created.

description.description: The details of a corporate annotation which has a corporate_annotation.type of “other”.

type.description:
The type of corporate annotation.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `corporate_annotation_type` section in the [enumeration mappings] (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml).

business_activity.description: Type of business undertaken by the UK establishment.

persons_with_significant_control.description: The URL of the persons with significant control list resource.

persons_with_significant_control_stateme.description: The URL of the persons with significant control statements list resource.

registers.description: The URL of the registers resource for this company

uk-establishments.description: The URL of the uk establishments list resource for this company.

overseas.description: The URL of the overseas details resource for this company.

officers.description: The URL of the company's officer list resource.

insolvency.description: The URL of the company's insolvency list resource.

filing_history.description: The URL of the company's filing history list resource.

charges.description: The URL of the company's charges list resource.

exemptions.description: The URL of the company's exemptions list resource.

can_file.description: Flag indicating whether this company can file.

jurisdiction.description: The jurisdiction specifies the political body responsible for the company.

date_of_creation.description: The date when the company was created.

date_of_cessation.description: The date which the company was converted/closed, dissolved or removed. Please refer to company status to determine which.

subtype.description: The subtype of the company. Possible values are:

partial_data_available.description:
Returned if Companies House is not the primary source of data for this company.
For enumeration descriptions see partial_data_available section in the enumeration mappings (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml).

external_registration_number.description: The number given by an external registration body.

last_full_members_list_date.description: The date of last full members list update.

super_secure_managing_officer_count.description: The total count of super secure managing officers for a `registered-overseas-entity`.

previous_company_names.description: The previous names of this company.

corporate_annotation.description: A corporate level message published by Companies House about a company, or situations affecting the company, or its information.

company_status.description:
The status of the company.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `company_status` section in the [enumeration mappings] (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml)

company_status_detail.description:
Extra details about the status of the company.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `company_status_detail` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml).

type.description:
The type of the company.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `company_type` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml)

undeliverable_registered_office_address.description: Flag indicating whether post can be delivered to the registered office.

registered_office_is_in_dispute.description: Flag indicating registered office address as been replaced.

branch_company_details.description: UK branch of a foreign company.

total_results.description: The number of further search results available for the current search.

start_index.description: The index into the entire result set that this result page starts.

items_per_page.description: The number of search items returned per page.

self.description: The URL of the resource being returned by the search item.

title.description: An array of character offset into the `title` string. These always occur in pairs and define the start and end of substrings in the member `title` that matched the search terms. The first character of the string is index 1.

snippet.description: An array of character offset into the `snippet` string. These always occur in pairs and define the start and end of substrings in the member `snippet` that matched the search terms. The first character of the string is index 1.

address_snippet.description: An array of character offset into the `address_snippet` string. These always occur in pairs and define the start and end of substrings in the member `address_snippet` that matched the search terms.

title.description: The title of the search result.

address_snippet.description: A single line address. This will be the address that matched within the indexed document or the primary address otherwise (as returned by the `address` member).

snippet.description: Summary information for the result showing additional details that have matched.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

kind.description: The type of search result. Refer to the full resource descriptions [CompanySearch resource](api/docs/company/company_number/CompanySearch-resource.html)  [OfficerSearch resource] (api/docs/company/company_number/OfficerSearch-resource.html) and [DisqualifiedOfficerSearch resource](api/docs/company/company_number/DisqualifiedOfficerSearch-resource.html) for the full list of members returned.

description_identifier.description: An array of enumeration types that make up the search description. See search_descriptions_raw.yaml in api-enumerations

kind.description: The type of search response returned.

items.description: The results of the completed search. See `items.kind` for details of each specific result resource returned.,

description_identifier.description: An array of enumeration types that make up the search description. See search_descriptions_raw.yaml in api-enumerations

company_number.description: The company registration / incorporation number of the company.

date_of_creation.description: The date the company was created.

kind.description: The type of search response returned.

items.description: The results of the completed search.

month.description: The month the officer was born in.

year.description: The year the officer was born in.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

postal_code.description: The postal code. For example CF14 3UZ.

kind.description: Describes the type of result returned.

date_of_birth.description: The officer date of birth details.

appointment_count.description: The total number of appointments the officer has.

description_identifiers.description: An array of enumeration types that make up the search description. See search_descriptions_raw.yaml in api-enumerations.

items.description: The results of the completed search.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

postal_code.description: The postal code. For example CF14 3UZ.

kind.description: Describes the type of result returned.

date_of_birth.description: The disqualified officer's date of birth.

description_identifiers.description: An array of enumeration types that make up the search description. See search_descriptions_raw.yaml in api-enumerations.

items.description: The results of the completed search.

dissolved_company_registered_office_addr.title: Registered Office Address
dissolved_company_registered_office_addr.description: This will only appear if there are ROA details in the company record

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address e.g Crown Way

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address

locality.description: The town associated to the ROA e.g Cardiff

company_number.description: The company number of the dissolved company

ceased_on.description: The date that the company ceased being known under the company name

effective_from.description: The date that the company started being known under the company name

name.description: The previous name of the company

company_name.description: The company name associated with the dissolved company

company_number.description: The company number of the dissolved company

ordered_alpha_key_with_id.description: The alphakey with it's id associated with the dissolved company

date_of_cessation.description: The date that the company was dissolved

date_of_creation.description: The date that the company was incorporated

allOf.description: The best matching company in dissolved search results

hits.description: The number of hits returned on a best-match or previous-company-names search

company_name.description: The company name associated with the company

company_number.description: The company number of the company

ordered_alpha_key_with_id.description: The alphakey with it's id associated with the company

company_type.description: The type of company associated with the company

allOf.description: The best matching company in alphabetical search results

advanced_company_registered_office_addre.title: Registered Office Address
advanced_company_registered_office_addre.description: This will only appear if there are ROA details in the company record

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address e.g Crown Way

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address

locality.description: The town associated to the ROA e.g Cardiff

company_name.description: The company name associated with the company

company_number.description: The company number of the company

company_status.description:
The status of the company.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `company_status` section in the [enumeration mappings] (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml)

company_type.description:
The type of the company.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `company_type` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml)

company_subtype.description:
The subtype of the company.  
 For enumeration descriptions see `company_subtype` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/constants.yml)

date_of_cessation.description: The date that the company was dissolved

date_of_creation.description: The date that the company was incorporated

allOf.description: The best matching company in an advanced search results

hits.description: The number of matches found using advanced search

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

month.description: The month of date of birth.

year.description: The year of date of birth.

appointments.description: Link to the officer appointment resource that this appointment is associated with.

self.description: Link to this individual company officer appointment resource.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

legal_authority.description: The legal authority supervising the company.

legal_form.description: The legal form of the company as defined by its country of registration.

anti_money_laundering_supervisory_bodies.description: The Anti-Money Laundering supervisory bodies that the authorised corporate service provider was registered with when verifying the officer.

appointment_verification_end_on.description: The date on which the identity verification statement was removed for the appointment.

appointment_verification_statement_due_o.description: The date by which an identity verification statement must be supplied for the appointment.

appointment_verification_start_on.description: The date on which the identity verification statement was supplied for the appointment.

authorised_corporate_service_provider_na.description: The name of the authorised corporate service provider that verified the identity of the officer.

identity_verified_on.description: The date on which the authorised corporate service provider verified the identity of the officer.

preferred_name.description: The name provided to the authorised corporate service provider by which the officer prefers to be known.

appointed_on.description: The date on which the officer was appointed. For the officer roles of `corporate-managing-officer` and `managing-officer` this is the date on which Companies House was notified about the officer.

person_number.description: Unique person identifier as displayed in bulk products 195, 198, 208, 209 and 216.

resigned_on.description: The date the officer was resigned. For the officer roles of `corporate-managing-officer` and `managing-officer` this is the date on which Companies House was notified about the officers cessation.

responsibilities.description: The responsibilities of the managing officer of a `registered-overseas-entity`.

appointed_before.description: The date the officer was appointed before. Only present when the is_pre_1992_appointment attribute is true.

is_pre_1992_appointment.description: Indicator representing if the officer was appointed before their appointment date.

self.description: Link to this officer list resource.

active_count.description: The number of active officers in this result set.

items_per_page.description: The number of officers to return per page.

resigned_count.description: The number of resigned officers in this result set.

start_index.description: The offset into the entire result set that this page starts.

total_results.description: The total number of officers in this result set.

<argument>.description: The element name and value pair required to complete the error description, will repeat as necessary.

location_type.description: Describes the type of location returned so that it may be parsed appropriately

location.description: The location in the submitted request in which the error relates. This parameter is only provided when errors[].type is set to "ch:validation".

error.description: The error being returned. See github for valid [enumeration types](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/develop/errors.yml)

error_values.description: A collection of argument name and value pairs which, when substituted into the error string, provide the full description of the error. As many name/value pairs as necessary to complete the error description are returned. See example above.

filing.description: The URL of the transaction for the resource.

persons_with_significant_control.description: List of registered company persons with significant control.

date.description: The date the annotation was added.

description.description:
A description of the annotation.
 For enumeration descriptions see `description` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/filing_history_descriptions.yml) file.

date.description: The date the associated filing was processed.

category.description: The category of the resolution filed.

A description of the associated filing.
 For enumeration descriptions see `description` section in the [enumeration mappings] (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/filing_history_descriptions.yml) file.

document_id.description: The document id of the resolution.

A description of the filing.
 For enumeration descriptions see `description` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/filing_history_descriptions.yml) file.

paper_filed.description: If true, indicates this is a paper filing.

items_per_page.description: The number of filing history items returned per page.

total_count.description: The total number of filing history items for this company.

psc_exempt_as_trading_on_regulated_marke.description: If present the company has been or is exempt from keeping a PSC register, as it has voting shares admitted to trading on a regulated market other than the UK.

psc_exempt_as_shares_admitted_on_market.description: If present the company has been or is exempt from keeping a PSC register, as it has voting shares admitted to trading on a market listed in the Register of People with Significant Control Regulations 2016.

psc_exempt_as_trading_on_uk_regulated_ma.description: If present the company has been or is exempt from keeping a PSC register, as it has voting shares admitted to trading on a UK regulated market.

psc_exempt_as_trading_on_eu_regulated_ma.description: If present the company has been or is exempt from keeping a PSC register, as it has voting shares admitted to trading on an EU regulated market.

disclosure_transparency_rules_chapter_fi.description: If present the company has been or is exempt from keeping a PSC register, because it is a DTR issuer and the shares are admitted to trading on a regulated market.

links.description: A set of URLs related to the resource, including self.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

postal_code.description: The postal code. For example CF14 3UZ.

varied_on.description: The date the variation was made against the disqualification.

case_identifier.description: The case identifier of the variation.

court_name.description: The name of the court that handled the variation case.

description_identifier.description:
An enumeration type that provides the description for the reason of disqualification.
 For enumeration descriptions see `description_identifier` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/disqualified_officer_descriptions.yml)

act.description:
An enumeration type that provides the law under which the disqualification was made.
 For enumeration descriptions see `act` section in the [enumeration mappings](https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/disqualified_officer_descriptions.yml)

article.description:
The article of the act under which the disqualification was made.
 Only applicable if `reason.act` is `company-directors-disqualification-northern-ireland-order-2002`.

section.description:
The section of the act under which the disqualification was made.
 Only applicable if `reason.act` is `company-directors-disqualification-act-1986` or `sanctions-anti-money-laundering-act-2018` or `sanctions-counter-terrorism-regulations-2019`.

case_identifier.description: The case identifier of the disqualification.

company_names.description: The companies in which the misconduct took place.

court_name.description: The name of the court that handled the disqualification case.

disqualification_type.description:
An enumeration type that provides the disqualifying authority that handled the disqualification case.
 For enumeration descriptions see `disqualification_type` section in the [enumeration mappings] (https://github.com/companieshouse/api-enumerations/blob/master/disqualified_officer_descriptions.yml)

disqualified_from.description: The date that the disqualification starts.

disqualified_until.description: The date that the disqualification ends.

heard_on.description: The date the disqualification hearing was on.

undertaken_on.description: The date the disqualification undertaking was agreed on.

last_variation.description: The latest variation made to the disqualification.

company_names.description: The companies for which the disqualified officer has permission to act.

expires_on.description: The date that the permission ends.

granted_on.description: The date that the permission starts.

date_of_birth.description: The disqualified officer's date of birth.

forename.description: The forename of the disqualified officer.

honours.description: The honours that the disqualified officer has.

nationality.description: The nationality of the disqualified officer.

other_forenames.description: The other forenames of the disqualified officer.

surname.description: The surname of the disqualified officer.

title.description: The title of the disqualified officer.

permissions_to_act.description: Permissions to act that have been granted for the disqualified officer.

country_of_registration.description: The country in which the disqualified officer was registered.

name.description: The name of the disqualified officer.

permissions_to_act.description: Permissions that the disqualified officer has to act outside of their disqualification.

month.description: The month the officer was born in.

year.description: The year the officer was born in.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address.

postal_code.description: The postal code. For example CF14 3UZ.

company_number.description: The number of the company the officer is acting for.

company_status.description: The status of the company the officer is acting for.

company.description: Link to the company profile resource that this appointment is associated with.

appointed_before.description: The date the officer was appointed before. Only present when the `is_pre_1992_appointment` attribute is `true`.

appointed_on.description: The date on which the officer was appointed. For the officer roles of `corporate-managing-officer` and `managing-officer` this is the date on which Companies House was notified about the officer.

name.description: The full name of the officer.

former_names.description: Former names for the officer, if there are any.

is_pre_1992_appointment.description: Indicator representing if the officer was appointed before their appointment date.

resigned_on.description: The date the officer was resigned. For the officer roles of `corporate-managing-officer` and `managing-officer` this is the date on which Companies House was notified about the officers cessation.

responsibilities.description: The responsibilities of the managing officer of a `registered-overseas-entity`.

total_results.description: The total number of officer appointments in this result set.
